Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Sep-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Herzlich & Blum, LLP's motion to be relieved as counsel for PLAINTIFF RSK VENTURES, LLC is ordered off calendar as moot; a request for dismissal of the entire action was filed August 27, 2020.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
